products.name: ANTOX-D and ANTOX-T Combo
products.shortDescription: Ayurvedic combo for metabolic health & diabetes support
products.description: The ANTOX-D and ANTOX-T combo is an Ayurvedic nutritional supplement kit primarily designed for metabolic health and diabetic support.
benefits: Increases efficiency of the pancreas
Reduces side effects on kidneys; heals wounds
Reduces numbness/swelling in limbs; aids eyesight
Improves memory; reduces depression and fatigue
Eliminates toxins from body and blood
Helps with weight loss and cholesterol
Relieves stress and boosts immunity
products.howToUse: Boil half a sachet of Antox-T in 100 ml of water. Add 5 ml of Antox-D liquid. Consume on empty stomach in morning and 1 hour before dinner. Follow diet chart and exercise.

benefits.diabetic_care: Reduces side effects on kidneys; heals wounds
benefits.physical_health: Reduces numbness/swelling in limbs; aids eyesight
benefits.mental_wellness: Improves memory; reduces depression and fatigue

benefits.organ_support: Eliminates toxins from body and blood
benefits.physical_health: Helps with weight loss and cholesterol

usage_instructions.preparation: Boil half a sachet of Antox-T in 100 ml of water.
usage_instructions.mixing: Add 5 ml of Antox-D liquid to the prepared tea.
usage_instructions.timing: Consume on an empty stomach in the morning and again 1 hour before dinner.
usage_instructions.additional_requirements: Follow the provided diet chart and exercise routine.

products.name: ANTOX-X and ANTOX-T Combo
products.primary_use: Enhance physical stamina, immunity, and metabolic health
products.key_features: Gentle formula, suitable for all skin types, crafted with premium ingredients.
products.shortDescription: Ayurvedic kit for stamina, immunity & metabolic health
products.description: The ANTOX-X and ANTOX-T combo is an Ayurvedic nutritional kit designed to enhance physical stamina, immunity, and metabolic health.
benefits: Improves muscle strength, stamina, liver strength, and immunity
Helps control stress levels
Aids in weight loss, cholesterol reduction, and detoxification
Beneficial for diabetes and stress relief
products.howToUse: Take 2 teaspoons (10g) of ANTOX-X powder in 100 ml of milk after dinner. For ANTOX-T: stop homemade tea, make 5 cups of decoction from 1 tea bag and consume throughout the day.

components.name: ANTOX-X
components.primary_benefits: Improves muscle strength, stamina, liver strength, and immunity. Helps control stress levels.

components.name: ANTOX-T
components.primary_benefits: Aids in weight loss, cholesterol reduction, and detoxification. Beneficial for diabetes and stress relief.

usage_instructions.antox_x: Take 2 teaspoons (10g) of powder in 100 ml of milk after dinner.
usage_instructions.antox_t: Stop drinking homemade tea. Instead, make 5 cups of decoction from 1 tea bag of Antox-T and consume throughout the day.
usage_instructions.note: This is a nutritional product intended to fulfill nutritional deficiencies and increase physical/mental strength.

products.name: ANTOX B-ACID and ANTOX-T Combo

benefits: Improves digestion; cleans stomach thoroughly
Reduces dizziness, headaches, and vomiting caused by acidity
Promotes peaceful sleep
Eliminates toxins from the body and blood
Beneficial for diabetes and cholesterol reduction
Increases immunity; helps with weight loss and stress relief
products.howToUse: Stroke the bottle 47 times before use. Add 7 drops into 1 cup of normal water. Take 3 times a day on an empty stomach. For acute acidity, can be taken anytime.

products.name: ANTOX-PN POWDER and ANTOX-PN OIL Combo
products.primary_use: Improve bone strength, joint flexibility, and skin health
products.shortDescription: Ayurvedic kit for bone strength, joint flexibility & skin health
products.description: The ANTOX-PN POWDER and ANTOX-PN OIL combo is an Ayurvedic nutritional kit formulated to improve bone strength, joint flexibility, and skin health.
benefits: Treats arthritis and rheumatism
Helps join broken bones and maintain cartilage
Fulfills deficiencies in protein, calcium, and minerals
Prevents bone loss in post-menopausal women
Reduces skin wrinkles associated with aging
Reduces all types of joint pain and inflammation
Removes 'Vata' (gas/imbalance) from joints
Can be used for body massage
Reduces skin dryness
products.howToUse: Powder: Mix 10g (2 teaspoons) in a cup of lukewarm milk once daily. Oil: Stroke bottle first, apply 8–9 drops to affected area, massage lightly, then warm salt water compress. Repeat twice daily.

components.name: ANTOX-PN POWDER
benefits: Treats arthritis and rheumatism.
Helps join broken bones and maintain cartilage.
Fulfills deficiencies in protein, calcium, and minerals.
Prevents bone loss in post-menopausal women.
Reduces skin wrinkles associated with aging.

components.name: ANTOX-PN OIL
benefits: Reduces all types of joint pain and inflammation.
Removes 'Vata' (gas/imbalance) from joints.
Can be used for body massage.
Reduces skin dryness.

usage_instructions.powder: Mix 10g (2 teaspoons) in a cup of lukewarm milk. Take once daily.
usage_instructions.oil: Stroke the bottle first, then apply 8–9 drops to the affected area. Massage lightly and follow with a warm salt water compress. Repeat twice daily.
